zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen Bosworth於1535年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯時，她的父親William Bosworth35歲，母親Alice Kennedy32歲。她於1549年9月2日與Richard Edward Atwood在英國英格蘭肯特沃爾坦結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1607年9月29日在她的家鄉享年72歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellen Bosworth于1535年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯时，她的父亲William Bosworth35岁，母亲Alice Kennedy32岁。她于1549年9月2日与Richard Edward Atwood在英国英格兰肯特沃爾坦结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1607年9月29日在她的家乡享年72岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Bosworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Husbands Bosworth in Leicestershire (Baresworde in Domesday Book) from an Old English personal name, Bār (from bār ‘boar’) + worth ‘enclosure’, and possibly also from Market Bosworth in Leicestershire, so named with an Old English personal name Bōsa + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen Bosworth was born in 1535, in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, her father, William Bosworth, was 35 and her mother, Alice Kennedy, was 32. She married Richard Edward Atwood on 2 September 1549, in Waltham, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 29 September 1607, in her hometown, at the age of 72, and was buried in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen Bosworth est née en 1535, à Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, William Bosworth, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alice Kennedy, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Edward Atwood le 2 septembre 1549, à Waltham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 29 septembre 1607, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

September 1549 in Waltham, Kent, England, United Kingdom Richard Edward Atwood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 29. September 1607 im Alter von 72 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Richard Edward Atwood il 2 settembre 1549, nel Waltham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 29 settembre 1607, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen Bosworthが1535年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマーケト ボスウオルスで生まれた時，父William Bosworthは35歳，母Alice Kennedyは32歳であった。1549年9月2日にイギリスイギリスケントワルサムでRichard Edward Atwoodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1607年9月29日に故郷で72歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマーケト ボスウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Bosworth(이)가 1535년 영국 레이스스터실르 마크트 보스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Bosworth(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Kennedy(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1549년 9월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 월섬에서 Richard Edward Atwood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1607년 9월 29일 그녀의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 마크트 보스워스에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Richard Edward Atwood em 2 de setembro de 1549, em Waltham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen Bosworth родилась в 1535 г. в местности маркет босворт, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Bosworth было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Kennedy, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Edward Atwood 2 сентября 1549 г. в местности валтам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 29 сентября 1607 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности маркет босворт, лисестиршир, Англия.

Se casó con Richard Edward Atwood el 2 de septiembre de 1549, en Waltham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1607, en su pueblo, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
